name: Lefi Abdelmonem - Expert Portfolio Tools
description: Exposes e-commerce contact forms, pricing plan selections, and SEO audit tools to browser-based AI agents.

tools.name: submitContactForm
tools.description: Sends a secure project inquiry or maintenance hire request directly to Lefi Abdelmonem.

name.description: The name of the client or company.

subject.description: The subject of the inquiry (e.g., General Inquiry, PrestaShop Development, Natural SEO Strategy, Platform Security Audit, AI & Automation Workflow, Standard/Professional/Enterprise Care Maintenance Plan).

message.description: A description of the project requirements, constraints, budget, or timeline.

tools.name: analyzeSeoMetadata
tools.description: Performs a real-time natural SEO audit, evaluates char limits, and calculates keyword density.

title.description: The page title to test in the simulated Google SERP snippet.

description.description: The page meta description to test.

keyword.description: The targeted natural SEO focus keyword.

content.description: A sample text snippet of the website page content to calculate density.
